audit_items.proof_trace: The ForkDigests cache is intentionally precomputed at startup with all BPO fork digests from cfg.BLOB_SCHEDULE (line 1806-1811). The atEpoch template (L1199-1211) dynamically selects the correct digest from this precomputed array based on epoch, so the 'derived state' is computed ahead of time for all known fork transitions rather than being stale cached data that requires refresh.
